reviews.review_description: This game is my porpoise to live 🤣🤣🤣
Can you at least try and fix the lagging it￼

developer_response.body: Most of the time lagging is from too many people I'm one room try switching rooms. Which I'm making it easier to do so.

reviews.review_description: Hi it's me again does this mean you can add the turtle hat? Still amazing game and thank you for responding! My freind just asked me if you could add a foot ball helmet because his name is Mr football

It is a good game but I can’t get into the discord because I can’t type the link can you post it in the description or under this post also I remember the pickle cosmetic someone won so it would be nice if you added that for him
If you go fast it’s super laggy but it’s really fun (add more maps)

reviews.review_title: Tips that you should add to the game 2
reviews.review_description:
1. Add Color changing￼
2. Make an option to change the color of the collar                                             MORE COMING SOON!
Can you fix the amount of lagging when running

It would be a good game if I could move around and be less laggy when I look at a wall or something what makes my game lag. 


But pls fix the game

developer_response.body: It tends to lag less in other game modes or even switching rooms but we are still working on the game

reviews.review_description: They spent months to remodel the game and make it better. I was happy once they released it and it is trash the old version was 10x better than this version. This game is for sure a waste of time and space on your oculus.

developer_response.body: Hey there! Sorry to hear you had a bad experience please note we are actively working to improve and make the game better with updates and there is so much more coming soon!

reviews.review_description: I used to be a moderator for this game kinda like how I was one of the creators for polar climb and the others didn't credit me for making the music besides that the older version of this game was more fun idk what culliswullis did but plz change it back

developer_response.body: There are a few things ingsme that are missing due to bugs but big things are on the way!

reviews.review_description: The colors are too bright and I can’t really see when I’m on a tree Maybe just turn the brightness a little down because then it will be easier for￼￼ people to see
Goofy but really great
I would give a 5 star but I tried to record it and it would not let me and my hands were invisible when I switched levels but great game

developer_response.body: Thanks were aware of these issues and are working on a fix!

reviews.review_description: My mic broke and can we play together some day???
Fun but when I got in a moderator walked up made fun of my name and kicked me idk why I just made my name the first thing that I thought of BOB.

developer_response.body: I'm sorry to hear that, although we do take these things very seriously  are you sure that one of our moderators were most likely just joking around as the name Bob is usually a "funny" name. Most of this disrespect has already been dealt with and we continue to find ways to improve.
